meta.title: Copal Peru - Premium Amazonian Black Copal Resin | Natural Incense
meta.description: Discover authentic Amazonian black copal resin from Peru. Premium natural incense for meditation, cleansing rituals, and aromatherapy. Sustainably sourced.

about.title: What Is Amazonian Black Copal (Copal Negro)?
about.lead: Deep in the Peruvian Amazon rainforest, black copal resin —known locally as copal negro— has been treasured for centuries as a sacred incense and aromatic gem. Traditionally used by indigenous communities to connect with the divine, its earthy, balsamic aroma creates a powerful link between body, spirit, and nature.
about.paragraph2: Harvested with respect for the forest, Amazonian black copal is a solid plant resin that hardens over time inside the bark of native trees. When burned, it transforms into a dense, white smoke used in spiritual ceremonies, meditation, and energy cleansing rituals across the world.
about.bullet1: 100% natural and sustainably harvested in the Peruvian Amazon
about.bullet2: Revered for its purifying and grounding properties
about.bullet3: Unique aroma profile: earthy, resinous, slightly balsamic
about.bullet4: Key ingredient in incense, smudge blends, and aromatherapy
about.image_alt: Amazonian black copal resin held in hands, sacred aromatic gem from Peru
